description: A resident reports that a streetlight on their block has been out for several days.

nodes.task_description: Gather the location of the streetlight, including the nearest address and the pole number if available.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately captures the location details.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for the public works department.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new work order for the repair.

nodes.task_description: Provide the resident with the work order number for their reference.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gives the resident a tracking number.
